default.title: I-Horizon Tech | Isofthiwe yebhizinisi, ifu, ne-AI
default.description: I-Horizon Tech iklama futhi ilethe isoftware yebhizinisi, izixazululo ze-AI, ingqalasizinda yefu, nemikhiqizo yedijithali yamaqembu anesifiso.

home.title: I-Horizon Tech | Izinhlelo zobunjiniyela ezikhulayo
home.description: Isoftware yebhizinisi, i-AI / ML, ingqalasizinda yefu, nokulethwa kwe-IoT kwamaqembu omhlaba.

about.title: Mayelana ne-Horizon Tech | Umsebenzi wenkampani neqembu
about.description: Funda nge-Horizon Tech, umsebenzi wethu, nokuthi siletha kanjani izixazululo zobuchwepheshe ezinomthelela ophezulu.

team.title: Ithimba | Ubuholi be-Horizon Tech kanye nochwepheshe
team.description: Hlangana nonjiniyela nabaholi abakha isoftware yebhizinisi namapulatifomu amafu e-Horizon Tech.

careers.title: Imisebenzi | Yakha nge-Horizon Tech
careers.description: Hlola izindima ezivulekile futhi ukhulise umsebenzi wakho nethimba lonjiniyela le-Horizon Tech.

contact.title: Xhumana ne-Horizon Tech | Qala iphrojekthi yakho
contact.description: Xhumana ne-Horizon Tech ukuxoxa ngephrojekthi yakho, izidingo zobuchwepheshe, kanye nesikhathi sokulethwa.

caseStudies.title: Izifundo zamacala | Imiphumela ye-Horizon Tech
caseStudies.description: Funda izifundo zamacala amaklayenti nemiphumela ehanjiswe yi-Horizon Tech kuzo zonke izimboni.

blog.title: Ibhulogi | I-Horizon Tech Insights
blog.description: Ukuqonda kwezobuchwepheshe, izifundo zokulethwa, kanye nesiqondiso sezakhiwo ezivela ku-Horizon Tech.

education.title: Imfundo | Izinsiza Zokufunda ze-Horizon Tech
education.description: Imihlahlandlela, izinkomba, nezinsizakusebenza zokufunda zobuchwepheshe ezivela ku-Horizon Tech.

support.title: Ukusekela | I-Horizon Tech
support.description: Thola izinsiza zokusekela nezinketho zokuxhumana zezinsizakalo ze-Horizon Tech.

privacy.title: Inqubomgomo Yobumfihlo | I-Horizon Tech
privacy.description: Funda inqubomgomo yobumfihlo ye-Horizon Tech kanye nokuzibophezela kokuvikelwa kwedatha.

terms.title: Imigomo Yesevisi | I-Horizon Tech
terms.description: Funda imigomo yesevisi ye-Horizon Tech yewebhusayithi yethu kanye nezinsizakalo.

profile.title: Iphrofayili | I-Horizon Tech
profile.description: Phatha iphrofayili yakho ye-Horizon Tech, izilungiselelo, nemininingwane ye-akhawunti.

firstTimeSetup.title: Ukusetha Isikhathi Sokuqala | I-Horizon Tech
firstTimeSetup.description: Qedela ukusethwa kwe-akhawunti yesikhathi sokuqala ukuze uqhubeke ku-Horizon Tech.

forgotPassword.title: Ikhohliwe iphasiwedi | I-Horizon Tech
forgotPassword.description: Setha kabusha ukufinyelela ku-akhawunti yakho ye-Horizon Tech.

resetPassword.title: Setha kabusha iphasiwedi | I-Horizon Tech
resetPassword.description: Yakha iphasiwedi entsha ye-akhawunti yakho ye-Horizon Tech.

confirmEmail.title: Qinisekisa i-imeyili | I-Horizon Tech
confirmEmail.description: Qinisekisa ikheli lakho le-imeyili ukuze usebenze i-akhawunti yakho ye-Horizon Tech.

admin.title: Iphaneli ye-Admin | I-Horizon Tech
admin.description: Indawo yokusebenzela yokuphatha yokuphathwa kwepulatifomu ye-Horizon Tech.

unauthorized.title: Okungagunyaziwe | I-Horizon Tech
unauthorized.description: Okwamanje awukwazi ukufinyelela kuleli khasi le-Horizon Tech.

services.title: Izinsizakalo | I-Horizon Tech
services.description: Hlola izinsizakalo ze-Horizon Tech kubunjiniyela besoftware, i-AI, ifu, i-DevOps, kanye nokuguqulwa kwedijithali.

innovationLab.title: I-Innovation Lab | I-Horizon Tech
innovationLab.description: Bheka ukuhlolwa kwe-Horizon Tech kanye nama-prototypes ku-AI nobunjiniyela obusetshenzisiwe.

authCallback.title: Ukungena ngemvume | I-Horizon Tech
authCallback.description: Ukuqedela ukungena ngemvume okuphephile kwe-akhawunti yakho ye-Horizon Tech.
